name: Black Angus Burger W/Cheddar &Grld Green Chiles (Gr)
recipeIngredient: 3 grilled poblano peppers, seeded and sliced into thirds
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
2. In a large mixing bowl, season the beef with salt and pepper. Refrigerate until ready to use.
3. When ready to use, form the beef into 1-inch thick disks.
4. Grill for five minutes on each side for medium rare.
5. During the last five minutes of grilling, top each patty with cheddar cheese.
6. When finished grilling, place one half of the roll on a plate and assemble the burger by adding the patty, baby red oak lettuce, grilled poblano peppers, vinaigrette, and pickled red onions. Serve immediately.
